---
title: "About"
---

::: {.lang-vi}
## Liên hệ
:::

::: {.lang-en}
## Contact me
:::

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
wf_key <- Sys.getenv("WF_KEY", unset = "")
cat(paste0('
<form id="cf" class="cf-form" enctype="multipart/form-data">
  <input type="hidden" id="cf-key" value="', wf_key, '">

  <div class="cf-field">
    <label for="cf-email">Your email</label>
    <input type="email" id="cf-email" required placeholder="your@email.com">
  </div>

  <div class="cf-field">
    <label for="cf-subject">Subject</label>
    <input type="text" id="cf-subject" required placeholder="Subject">
  </div>

  <div class="cf-field">
    <label for="cf-message">Message</label>
    <textarea id="cf-message" rows="6" required placeholder="Your message\u2026"></textarea>
  </div>

  <div class="cf-field">
    <label for="cf-file">Attachment <span class="cf-optional">(optional)</span></label>
    <input type="file" id="cf-file" multiple>
  </div>

  <div class="cf-actions">
    <button type="submit" class="cf-submit">Send</button>
    <span id="cf-status"></span>
  </div>
</form>

<script>
(function () {
  var form = document.getElementById("cf");
  if (!form) return;
  form.addEventListener("submit", function (e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    var btn    = form.querySelector(".cf-submit");
    var status = document.getElementById("cf-status");
    var key    = document.getElementById("cf-key").value;
    if (!key) {
      status.className = "cf-error";
      status.textContent = "Form not configured \u2014 email nguyenkhoiquan@gmail.com directly.";
      return;
    }
    btn.disabled = true;
    btn.textContent = "Sending\u2026";
    status.className = "";
    status.textContent = "";
    var data = new FormData();
    data.append("access_key",  key);
    data.append("from_name",   "quan-nk.github.io contact");
    data.append("subject",     document.getElementById("cf-subject").value);
    data.append("email",       document.getElementById("cf-email").value);
    data.append("message",     document.getElementById("cf-message").value);
    var files = document.getElementById("cf-file").files;
    for (var i = 0; i < files.length; i++) { data.append("attachment[]", files[i]); }
    fetch("https://api.web3forms.com/submit", { method: "POST", body: data })
      .then(function (r) { return r.json(); })
      .then(function (json) {
        if (json.success) {
          status.className = "cf-ok";
          status.textContent = "Sent! I will get back to you soon.";
          form.reset();
        } else { throw new Error(json.message || "Submission failed."); }
      })
      .catch(function () {
        status.className = "cf-error";
        status.textContent = "Something went wrong. Email me: nguyenkhoiquan@gmail.com";
      })
      .finally(function () { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = "Send"; });
  });
})();
</script>
'))
```
